input.question: Which are the 15 most popular courses by total enrollment?

payload.question: Which are the 15 most popular courses by total enrollment?

output.sql:
WITH course_counts AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.name AS course_name,
    COUNT(e.student_id) AS total_enrollment
  FROM courses c
  LEFT JOIN enrollments e
    ON e.course_id = c.id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_name,
  total_enrollment
FROM course_counts
ORDER BY total_enrollment DESC
LIMIT 15;

payload.sql:
WITH course_counts AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.name AS course_name,
    COUNT(e.student_id) AS total_enrollment
  FROM courses c
  LEFT JOIN enrollments e
    ON e.course_id = c.id
  GROUP BY c.id, c.name
)
SELECT
  course_id,
  course_name,
  total_enrollment
FROM course_counts
ORDER BY total_enrollment DESC
LIMIT 15;
